Employee Master — ESI / PF / PT Configuration
# Name Category Monthly Rate ₹ ESI PF PT Routing Mode Lock DA
🔒 Locked = salary structure fixed, only Days Worked editable in calculator  ·  Regular employees eligible for ESI / PF / PT within statutory caps  ·  Daily wage workers: cash only, no deductions  ·  DA = Differently Abled — no DW pool routing through their salary

📊 Reports
Inventory & Production Intelligence
Components Blocking the Most Shop Orders
Ranks components by how many open SOs they are blocking due to shortage. Fix the top component = unblock the most orders.
Critical Components — Top 5 Highest-Qty Shop Orders
Shows the 5 open SOs with the highest planned quantity, then lists every component with shortage status. Focus procurement here for maximum output.
Component Requirements — Previous Month Pending Orders
Lists all components required by open Pending Orders with due dates in the previous calendar month. Useful for backlog analysis.
Non-Moving Inventory
Items with positive stock but no ledger activity in the selected period. Identify dead stock for return, scrap, or reorder review.
PO Coverage vs. Demand Gap
For each short component, shows open PO quantity ordered. Highlights items where even the PO won't cover demand — these need immediate action.
New Delivery Challan
📤 FROM (Consignor)
↑ Enter GST to auto-fill party
📥 TO (Consignee)
↑ Enter GST to auto-fill party
📦 Line Items
# Item Code Description Qty Unit FG Stock Avail.
🔄 Returnable Items (Free-text — tools, equipment, jigs etc.)
# Item / Description Qty Unit Expected Return Date
ℹ Returnable Challan — no ledger/inventory deduction. Items listed are sent for external work and expected back. Attach to physical goods when dispatching tools or equipment.

GST Party Master
Manage consignors & consignees — GST number auto-fills From/To fields

📧 Email Delivery Challan
⚠ Testing Mode — Sender: [email protected]  |  "Open in Gmail" opens a pre-filled Gmail compose window
PDF Attachment:
To attach a PDF — click 🖨 Print Challan and use "Save as PDF" from the print dialog, then manually attach to your email.
Add Item
⚖ Unit Weight (g/pc)
Required for Phone stock counter — weigh one piece on your scale
💡 Enter 0 if not yet measured. Green = set, dash = not set in table.

Only BOMs with existing components are shown

AI BOM ENGINEER
Powered by Claude · Analyzes your existing BOM patterns to generate component suggestions
Ready — click Generate to start
📚 REFERENCE BOMs CLAUDE WILL ANALYSE
🔬
AI BOM Analysis Engine
Claude will scan your existing BOMs, identify structural patterns in item codes and component families, and generate a suggested BOM for
💡 How it works:
1. Finds BOMs with similar item code patterns
2. Analyses component families and quantities
3. Suggests likely components with confidence scores
4. You review, adjust qty/scrap%, and approve each row

📊
Click to select Macola Excel file
.xlsx or .xls
REQUIRED COLUMNS
ITEM_NO  |  QTY_ON_HAND  |  AS_OF_DATE (optional)
If AS_OF_DATE is blank, today's date is used. Supports Excel serial dates from Macola.
ITEM QTY DATE STATUS
✅
🎯 Priority List Upload
Priority list overrides due-date sorting in AI Allocator. Rank 1 = highest priority. Items without a rank sort by due date below ranked items.
🎯
Click to select Priority Excel file
.xlsx or .xls
REQUIRED COLUMNS
ITEM_NO  |  QTY  |  PRIORITY
PRIORITY = integer rank (1 = highest). One row per order line — matched by Item + Qty.
ACTIVE PRIORITY LIST

📥 Import BOM Components from Excel
1 · SELECT FILE
2 · PREVIEW & VALIDATE
3 · IMPORT COMPLETE
📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (row 1 = headers):

Parent_Item_Code  |  Component_Item_Code  |  Qty_Per  |  Scrap_Pct (optional, default 2)  |  Line No (optional)

✔ Compact format supported — Parent_Item_Code may appear only on the first row. Blank cells will automatically inherit the value above.
✔ Items do NOT need to exist in the Item Master — new items and BOM Headers will be auto-created on import.

Click ⬇ Template in the toolbar to download a ready-made template.
ROW PARENT ITEM COMPONENT ITEM QTY PER SCRAP % STATUS

📂
Click to select Excel file (.xlsx / .xls)
or drag and drop here
Required Excel columns (any header names work):

Part Number / Item Code   +   Quantity / Stock / QtyOH

Stock will be compared against current values. You will see a preview before any changes are applied. Items not found in the Item Master will be skipped.
